chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1122 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of CMA 4654/2023 3.For hearing of main case 20-09-2023 Mr. Riaz Hussain Khaskheli, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Mehboob Ali Wassan, Assistant A.G. ***** This petition has been filed by the petitioner for quashment of FIR No.91 of 2022, registered at P.S, Kumb for offences under Sections 452, 376(ii) & 343 PPC. During course of arguments, it has transpired that although I.O let off the accused and placed their names in column- II of the Challan, but the Magistrate concerned disagreed with his opinion and took cognizance of the offences against the accused and such order has been passed by him. Against that order, the petitioner has a remedy under Section 561-A CrPC or before the trial Court, under Section 265-K CrPC. Faced with such position, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press this petition and submits that petitioner would avail the remedy in accordance with law. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
